name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Constants *)
N == 5

(* Helper functions *)
LEFT(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RIGHT(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* State definitions *)
THINKING == 0
HUNGRY == 1
EATING == 2

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> THINKING]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
  \/ (* Philosopher i becomes hungry *)
     /\ \E i \in 1..N : states[i] = THINKING
     /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = HUNGRY]
  \/ (* Philosopher i starts eating if both forks are free *)
     /\ \E i \in 1..N : states[i] = HUNGRY
     /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = 0
     /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = 0
     /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LEFT(i)] = i, ![RIGHT(i)] = i]
     /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = EATING]
  \/ (* Philosopher i puts down forks after eating *)
     /\ \E i \in 1..N : states[i] = EATING
     /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LEFT(i)] = 0, ![RIGHT(i)] = 0]
     /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = THINKING]

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ forks \in [1..N -> 1..N]
          /\ states \in [1..N -> {THINKING, HUNGRY, EATING}]

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail

Init == /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
        /\ head \in 1..K
        /\ tail \in 1..K
        /\ Len(q) = 0
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1

Producer == /\ Len(q) < K
           /\ head' = head
           /\ tail' = tail
           /\ q' = Append(q, 1)

Consumer == /\ Len(q) > 0
           /\ head' = head
           /\ tail' = tail
           /\ q' = Tail(q)

Next == Producer \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = NULL
        /\ state = "Follower"

Next == \/ /\ state = "Follower"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = "Follower"
        \/ /\ state = "Candidate"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
        /\ votedFor' = NULL
        /\ state' = "Candidate"
        \/ /\ state = "Leader"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DistributedSnapshot ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES state, channel, recorded, markerSent, markerReceived
====

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token

Init == /\ token \in 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

====

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values

VARIABLES store

Init == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
Next == /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values :
        /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<>>
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

====

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Sender ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE
VARIABLES retransmitCount, sentChunks

    /\ file \in Seq
    /\ chunks = [i \in 1..Len(file) \div i \in 1..Len(file) \div CHUNK_SIZE |-> SubSeq(file, i, CHUNK_SIZE)]
    /\ sentChunks = <<>>
    /\ retransmitCount = 0

Next ==
    /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, [chunk |-> chunks[Len(sentChunks)+1], retransmitCount |-> retransmitCount])
    /\ retransmitCount' = IF retransmitCount < MAX_RETRIES THEN retransmitCount + 1 ELSE retransmitCount

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount>>

TypeOK ==
    /\ file \in Seq
    /\ chunks \in [1..Len(file) \div CHUNK_SIZE \in 1..Len(file) \div CHUNK_SIZE |-> Seq]
    /\ sentChunks \in Seq
    /\ retransmitCount \in Nat

====
